description: Bare bones utility verion of the patrol. the series 4 GU ute launched in 2007 for the australian market and remained virtually unchanged until its discontinuation in 2016. The series 4 facelifted utes had 3 litre 4 banger in place of the old td42 inline 6, which made slightly more power at the cost of reliability.
creator: NissanLover89
